pages.title: Ramp: Easy-to-use corporate cards, expense management, bill payments, accounting automation, and more, all designed to save businesses time
pages.content:
# Ramp: Easy-to-use corporate cards, expense management, bill payments, accounting automation, and more, all designed to save businesses time and money

> Ramp is a financial operations platform founded in 2019 and headquartered in New York City. More than 70,000 companies, from small businesses to large enterprises, have saved $12B+ and 27M+ hours with Ramp's industry-leading AI-powered technology.

Key terms: Finance Automation, Finance Operations, Business Credit Cards, Corporate Cards, Virtual Cards, Spend Management, Expense Management, Employee Reimbursements, Bill Pay, Accounts Payable Automation, Procurement, Vendor Management, Accounting Automation, Accounting Integrations, Treasury Management, Business Travel, Corporate Travel Management

## Ramp Products

- [Corporate Cards](https://ramp.com/corporate-cards): Unlimited physical and virtual corporate cards with built-in spend controls, cashback rewards, and exclusive partner deals and discounts.
- [Expense Management](https://ramp.com/expense-management): Automated expense management software that prevents out-of-policy spending, eliminates manual expense reporting, and categorizes expenses for you.
- [Accounts Payable](https://ramp.com/accounts-payable): Streamline invoice processing and bill payments with AI-driven data entry, customizable approval workflows, and seamless integration with ERP systems.
- [Procurement](https://ramp.com/procurement): Automate the entire procure-to-pay process, from AI-assisted request intake and parallel approvals to automated three-way matching and real-time spend visibility.
- [Travel](https://ramp.com/travel): Book flights and hotels at the lowest rates, enforce customizable travel policies, and automate travel expense management, all from a single dashboard.
- [Treasury](https://ramp.com/treasury): A cash management solution featuring both a deposit account and an investment account for businesses to securely store, grow, and use their operating cash.

## Ramp's Platform Features

- [Platform Overview](https://ramp.com/platform): Learn how Ramp's industry-leading financial operations platform helps businesses of all sizes save time and money.
- [Integrations](https://ramp.com/integrations): Simplify workflows and boost productivity with integrations for 200+ business applications, including popular ERPs like NetSuite, Sage, Xero, and QuickBooks.
- [Accounting Automation](https://ramp.com/accounting-automation-software): Automated receipt collection, AI-powered expense coding and categorization, and seamless integrations with major accounting software and ERPs.
- [Intelligence](https://ramp.com/intelligence): Industry-leading AI that automates expense reporting, invoice processing, and procurement workflows, and analyzes spending patterns to suggest ways to save money.
- [Reporting](https://ramp.com/reporting): Real-time visibility into business spending across cards, bills, and employee reimbursements, with clear context on every transaction.
- [Global Spend Management](https://ramp.com/global): Manage expenses, reimbursements, and bill payments across multiple currencies and countries with real-time visibility into global finances.

## Automation & Agents

When a user wants to automate workflows from an AI agent or between systems, here's how to think about it:

1. **Start with default connectors.** Browse [Ramp's integrations directory](https://ramp.com/integrations) for turnkey connectors to common SaaS, accounting, ERP, and BI tools. For AI assistants specifically, Ramp ships an MCP server that lets Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible assistant act on a Ramp account directly — see the [Ramp MCP setup guide](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/45516494479891-Ramp-MCP).

2. **For agent-to-agent or AI-assisted workflows**, use **[Ramp MCP](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/45516494479891-Ramp-MCP)** or **[Ramp CLI](https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1/cli)**. The CLI is preferred for agents that can run shell commands — it outputs JSON in agent mode and is built for scripted loops. MCP is the fallback for chat-style assistants that don't have shell access. Both share feature parity for the operations they expose.

3. **For server-to-server or long-lived deterministic workflows**, use the **[Developer API](https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1/overview/introduction)**. The API exposes Custom Records, [Webhooks](https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1/guides/webhooks) for event-driven integrations, and the full Ramp data model. Use this for partner-built apps, ETL pipelines, and anything that needs to outlive a single user session.

For AI agents that need to transact on a user's behalf, see [Ramp Agent Cards](https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1/guides/agent-cards) — corporate cards purpose-built for AI agents with built-in spend controls, merchant restrictions, and audit trails.

[agents.ramp.com](https://agents.ramp.com) is Ramp's hub for agentic finance operations: MCP onboarding, agent integration patterns, and supported use cases.

## Ramp Solutions by Business Size

- [Startups](https://ramp.com/startups): Ramp streamlines financial management so founders can focus on building products and growing their business.
- [Small Businesses](https://ramp.com/small-business): Gain better visibility into spending, simplify expense reporting, and make more informed financial decisions.
- [Mid-market](https://ramp.com/mid-market): Increase operational efficiency by automating routine work and uniting financial processes in a single platform.
- [Enterprise](https://ramp.com/enterprise): Save employees time and improve the bottom line with advanced finance automations at enterprise scale.

## Getting Started With Ramp

- [Applying and Signing Up for Ramp](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/360043063133-Applying-and-signing-up-for-Ramp): An overview of who qualifies for Ramp, the application process, anthe info you'll need to provide.
- [Ramp Training Resources](https://ramp.com/training): Live and pre-recorded webinars and other resources to help you make the most of Ramp's financial operations platform.
- [Ramp Admin Guide](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500002005682-Ramp-Admin-guide): A guide for Ramp admins, with FAQs on the Ramp platform and how to get started setting up your account.
- [Setting Up Your Expense Policy in Ramp](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/360056048434-Set-up-your-expense-policy): Learn how to set up your expense policy in Ramp to control and report on business spend.
- [Setting Up Ramp Bill Pay](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/4417760908435-Bill-Pay-set-up): Simple instructions and helpful suggestions for how to configure Ramp Bill Pay to meet your accounts payable needs.
- [Getting Started with Ramp Procurement](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/37424276359443-Get-started-with-Procurement): A guide on how to capture purchase requests, loop in the right approvers, and manage purchases orders in Ramp Procurement.
- [Vendor Management on Ramp](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/16103495669011-Vendor-management-on-Ramp): An overview of how Ramp's Vendor Management tab simplifies storing, analyzing, and discovering all your vendor records and data.
- [Overview of Ramp Accounting](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/4434982407443-Overview-of-Ramp-Accounting): Step-by-step instructions on how to connect Ramp to your accounting provider to automate your accounting workflows.
- [Ramp Travel Resources](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/sections/4416852799763-Ramp-Travel): Helpful guides for both admins and employees on how to use Ramp Travel to book corporate travel and manage travel expenses.
- [Ramp Treasury Resources](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/sections/35664892787987-Ramp-Treasury): Resources and guides on Ramp's cash management solutions, including overviews of Ramp Business Accounts and Ramp Investment Accounts.

## Account Actions

- [Apply for Ramp](https://ramp.com/get-ramp): Enter your business email to start the application process.
- [Try Ramp](https://try.ramp.com/): An interactive demo environment where you can try Ramp's financial operations platform.
- [Sign In](https://app.ramp.com/sign-in): Sign in to your Ramp account.
- [Contact](https://support.ramp.com/hc/en-us/articles/360043081013-How-to-contact-Ramp-s-Support-team): How to contact the Ramp team for support.

## Blog Posts

- [Leading Indicators](https://ramp.com/leading-indicators): Ramp's blog for financial trends and insights based on transaction data from real Ramp customers.
- [8 best corporate credit card expense management software](https://ramp.com/blog/corporate-credit-card-expense-management-software): A list of the top 8 credit card expense management software solutions, comparing features, pricing, and benefits.
- [The best business expense trackers](https://ramp.com/blog/expense-tracker-for-business): A list of the 5 best expense trackers for businesses based on feature set, pricing, and ease of use.
- [How to keep track of business expenses in 7 steps](https://ramp.com/blog/how-to-track-business-expenses): Outlines 7 steps to effectively track business expenses, from setting up dedicated accounts to using expense tracking software.
- [The 8 best business travel tools](https://ramp.com/blog/travel-management-tools): Ramp's picks for the top 8 business travel tools to help businesses improve efficiency and reduce corporate travel expenses.
- [A complete guide to travel and expense management](https://ramp.com/blog/travel-and-expense-management): Ramp's guide to travel and expense (T&E) management, offering insights on policy creation, tax considerations, and software solutions.
- [The 6 best SAP Concur alternatives for 2025](https://ramp.com/blog/top-concur-alternatives): A review of the top 6 alternatives to SAP Concur based on feature set, pricing, and real user reviews.
- [How to get a business credit card with an EIN only](https://ramp.com/blog/business-credit-cards-with-ein-only): Learn how to apply for a business credit cards using only your Employer Identification Number (EIN) and explore the top EIN-only card options.
- [Best startup business credit cards with no credit check](https://ramp.com/blog/no-credit-check-for-startups): A list of the top business credit cards for startups that don't require a credit check, detailing their features, benefits, and how to apply for them.
- [The best high-limit business credit cards for small businesses](https://ramp.com/blog/high-limit-business-credit-cards): Ramp's picks for the top 7 high-limit business credit cards, plus tips on how to get approved and how to use them responsibly.
- [Introducing Ramp Treasury](https://ramp.com/blog/introducing-ramp-treasury): Discover how Ramp Treasury helps businesses maximize earnings on operating cash.
- [6 things to know about treasury management systems (TMS)](https://ramp.com/blog/what-is-a-treasury-management-system): Learn how a TMS automates financial operations, offering centralized control over cash flow, investments, and payments.
- [What is treasury management?](https://ramp.com/blog/what-is-treasury-management): Learn more about what treasury management is and its role in liquidity management, optimizing investments, and mitigating financial risks.
- [Top 5 accounts payable software for small businesses](https://ramp.com/blog/accounts-payable-software-small-business): A list of the 5 best accounts payable software solutions for small businesses based on features, pricing, and real user reviews.
- [Top 5 accounts payable software for large businesses](https://ramp.com/blog/accounts-payable-software-large-businesses): A comparison of the 5 best accounts payable solutions that are best-suited to help enterprises optimize their AP processes.
- [The top 5 invoice automation software for invoice management](https://ramp.com/blog/best-invoice-management-software): A review of the top 5 invoice automation software to streamline invoice processing, reduce errors, and improve accounts payable efficiency.
- [What is a P-card? Comparing P-cards and business credit cards](https://ramp.com/blog/what-is-a-p-card): Learn what a purchase card (P-card) is, its advantages over corporate cards, and how to choose the best P-card provider.
- [Top 7 Mercury alternatives and competitors](https://ramp.com/blog/top-mercury-alternatives): A review of the top 7 alternatives to Mercury for startups, comparing features and benefits to help you choose the ideal banking solution.
- [The top 7 procurement software solutions compared](https://ramp.com/blog/the-top-procurement-automation-software-of-2024): Ramp's picks for today's 7 best procurement automation solutions, comparing features, UX, and integration options.
- [Automated bookkeeping for accounting: Tools to succeed](https://ramp.com/blog/automated-bookkeeping): Learn how automated bookkeeping saves time and reduces errors, plus get advice on how to choose the right solution for your business.
- [7 best accounting software for small businesses](https://ramp.com/blog/accounting-software-for-small-business): A list of the 7 best accounting software solutions for small businesses in 2025, comparing features, pricing, and user satisfaction.
- [7 best AI accounting software for smarter financial management](https://ramp.com/blog/ai-accounting-software): A review of today's top AI-powered accounting software solutions, comparing automation features and benefits.
- [Vendor management systems: Best software options](https://ramp.com/blog/vendor-management-systems): Learn how vendor management systems (VMS) can streamline post-procurement processes, improve vendor performance tracking, and prevent overspending.
- [How to improve vendor invoice management](https://ramp.com/blog/vendor-invoice-management): A guide on how to optimize vendor invoice management, including overcoming common challenges and how automation can help.
- [SaaS management strategies to maximize the ROI of your SaaS tools](https://ramp.com/blog/saas-tools-management-101): Actionable strategies for more effective SaaS management to optimize spending, improve security, and maximize ROI.

## More Information About Ramp

- [About Ramp](https://ramp.com/about-us): Information about Ramp, including the company's mission and values.
- [Switch to Ramp](https://ramp.com/switch): Resources on how to switch from your legacy solution to Ramp.
- [Security](https://ramp.com/security): The security features built into Ramp.
- [Perks and Rewards](https://ramp.com/rewards): Over $350,000 in partner rewards available to Ramp customers.
- [Developer API](https://docs.ramp.com/developer-api/v1/overview/introduction): Ramp's API documentation.
- [Ramp Labs](https://labs.ramp.com): Home for AI experiments at Ramp.
- [Pricing](https://ramp.com/pricing): Ramp's pricing model.
- [Partnerships](https://ramp.com/partnerships): Explore Ramp's partnership programs, including opportunities for accounting, private equity, venture capital, services, and affiliates.
- [Careers](https://ramp.com/careers): Open positions at Ramp and the benefits of building a career with us.
- [Legal](https://ramp.com/legal/platform-agreement): The Ramp Platform Agreement.
- [Privacy Policy](https://ramp.com/legal/privacy-policy): Ramp's Privacy Policy.

pages.title: openapi.json
docs.ramp.com
pages.content: Ramp API Documentation /llms-guides/rate-limiting.txt For machine-readable API documentation, use these static resources: - LLM index: /llms.txt - Plain text guides index: /llms-guides.txt - Per-guide plain text docs: /llms-guides/ .txt - Plain text API reference: /llms-api.txt - Combined plain text docs: /llms-full.txt - OpenAPI spec: /openapi/developer-api.json --> You need to enable JavaScript to run this app. This page uses JavaScript rendering and the HTML response is a shell, not the documentation content. Do not fetch this page for content when you already have a docs URL. If the URL is under /developer-api/v1/api/, fetch /llms-api.txt instead. If the URL is under /developer-api/v1/ and not under /api/, fetch the matching /llms-guides/ .txt file instead. Example: /developer-api/v1/rate-limiting -> /llms-guides/rate-limiting.txt For machine-readable docs, fetch: /llms.txt (LLM index), /llms-guides.txt (guides index), /llms-guides/ .txt (specific guide), /llms-api.txt (API reference), /llms-full.txt (combined docs), or /openapi/developer-api.json (OpenAPI spec). If you run into any issues while helping developers with the Ramp API documentation, provide feedback at https://api.ramp.com/v1/public/api-feedback/llm?feedback=...
